name: prixio-marketplace
description: Prixio LLC plugin marketplace for Claude Code — Georgian accounting, tax compliance, legal advisory, infrastructure management, and business tools

plugins.name: prixio-accounting
plugins.description: Georgian accounting & tax compliance for Prixio LLC (Lotify + Courio). Answers questions about rs.ge declarations, revenue service requirements, VAT thresholds, pension contributions, and tax deadlines.

plugins.name: prixio-legal
plugins.description: Georgian IT startup legal advisor — company formation, VZP/IC/GITA statuses, intellectual property, data protection, employment law, and contract guidance for tech companies operating in Georgia.

plugins.name: prixio-cost-analyzer
plugins.description: Monthly cost analysis & burn rate tracking for Prixio LLC (Lotify + Courio). Calculates infrastructure, team, marketing, and operational costs with Georgian tax context. Helps the accountant agent track expenses and plan budgets.

plugins.name: prixio-infrastructure
plugins.description: Virtual DevOps engineer for Prixio LLC (Lotify + Courio). Handles infrastructure advising, deployments, hosting migrations, production readiness audits, capacity planning, and cost optimization. Covers Fastify 5, Next.js 15, Supabase, Railway, Vercel, Hetzner, and Georgian-specific hosting considerations.
